title: Defense of Gyndine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Gyndine}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Attack on Gyndine]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' *[[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Mandalore]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Protector_Fleet.jpg]] |name=Defense of Gyndine |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}} |date=[[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] |place=[[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] |result=[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] victory{{CSWECite|I|378|Gyndine}} |side1=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side2=[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']]''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=*[[Mandalorian Supercommando]]s *1 [[Mandalorian dungeon ship]] *[[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship]] *[[Meteor-class Q-Carrier|''Meteor''-class Q-Carriers]] *[[Gladiator-class assault fighter|''Gladiator''-class fighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Boba-running with a bunch of other guys in Mandalorian armor and jet packs. He even managed to come up with a new Firespray.''"
"''Well, I wasn't going to say anything, but I heard that that same bunch showed up to help liberate Ord Mantell.''"
"''And Tholatin.'"
"''And Gyndine.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Talon Karrde]], [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]], and [[Booster Terrik]]|}} The '''defense of Gyndine''' was fought late in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In the battle, [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], under [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], liberated the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] control. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|117|FET 35-36|Boba Fett}} *{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Defensa de Gyndine |pl=Druga bitwa o Gyndine (29 ABY) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Gyndine, defense of}} [[Category:Battles of Gyndine]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
